name: Love In Quarantine
overview:
"Love in Quarantine," the first production from HeartShaker Media.

A story set in a world on the brink of devastation, leading to survival, constant danger, and the beginning of an unexpected love.A strange fever spread from the borders, then through the provinces, and then silently crept into the capital. But this creeping disease would bring our worlds together.

And when it did, the girl who should have remained a stranger became the one person he couldn't ignore.
